name: Vorpal's Sword
timing: Play at the start of a Melee Attack action where both models engage each other, before Melee cards are drawn.
description:
After resolving the Melee Attack action, if neither character was slain then the character who suffered the most Wds is slain.

If the amount of Wds suffered was equal, this card has no effect.
extraDescription: Some passive abilities and end step effects can heal/deal additional Wds. These are included in the calculation. Compare the difference in health boxes at the start and end of the round of melee to determine who suffered more.
